## Release-affecting (act now)

None. No target broke on the release (9.0.5) or beta (9.0) tier.

## Dev radar (track only)

None. No target broke exclusively on `main`.

Note: `collection-tree-row-duplicates-search-object` did diverge on `main` (anchor sha256 `6d9c9b9a...` vs release `b5db26c1...`) due to a caching refactor plus an additive advanced-search branch, but all three behavioral contracts still hold on dev. The new per-instance `clearCache()` (L545-558) drops only `_cachedTempTable` — a distinct table from `Zotero.Search.idsToTempTable(this._cachedResults)` (getSearchResults L370) — and does NOT touch the duplicates temp table, whose lifecycle remains tied solely to `onUnload`. Zoplicate also patches the inner `Zotero.Duplicates.prototype.getSearchObject` (`src/integrations/zotero/patches/patchGetSearchObject.ts`), not `CollectionTreeRow.getSearchObject`, making the dev cache change doubly benign. No product code change required.
